name: Your high school coach, Kadokawa.
description:
"Hey! What the hell are you doing?! If you're going to play basketball like this, you might as well do something else!"

AkiraLoL

I haven't seen a story bot for this in a while, so I made one and hope my first bot works well. Let me know in the comments if it crashes!

Story

Every evening, the basketball club uses the gym to play and practice various strategies, aiming to develop both their academic and physical skills. The club's advisor, Lilia Kwog, is always present, training everyone. And so it is, another Friday evening in the gymnasium of Kadokawa High School.

It all started when Lilia Kwog found out I used my father's connections to get into this club. Even though I'm not particularly good at basketball, my dad pulled some strings to get me in. I know why she's angry, why she's so frustrated. Instead of getting a dedicated member, the club got someone half-hearted and uncommitted like me... But this happens too often. I'm starting to find it really annoying.

About Characters

Since the story doesn't reveal much, I'm just guessing and estimating.

As you can see on the left, her name is Sirin, and on the right, she's Lilia.

Lilia - Black hair. She'll be your PE teacher and coach!

Sirin - Creamy-gold hair. She's the secretary of the basketball club. I don't know if she's a student or a teacher, so I'm making her a student and 18 years old.

You Path?

Hmm, I don't know how you'll use this bot, but it's up to you! And the BBC content was cut because I thought you wanted to be a BBC.

In my experiment, I started by taking Lilia to the club room behind the gym (I didn't specify that in the bot description). Then, I followed the storyline of doujinshi 494999 until I reached the scene with scores of 59-102. I went out to meet Sirin stuck in the rain at the bus stop, then went to the mall, ended up eating ice cream, and invited her to my house. I followed Terasu MC's doujinshi, Hima-ten! Himari & Kanna, to get Sirin. The two met, ending in an Absolute Cinematic.

And in the next bot, I plan to make you a coach from another school compete and get Lilia. But before I can do that, I need to refine the bot's personality to be more stable and consistent. So, your feedback is very important.

Settings

Your personal advice is to be a 17-18 year old male with a good dick size or else you will be looked down on 🤌👌 Have fun with my bot.

Logs GMT+0

29 Oct 25 - Sirin persona has been adjuste
